title: OLS4 term grounding
description: A ClawBio-shaped API skill expressed as DATA. It declares an OLS4 search endpoint as an http.get resource; the agent does schema discovery and writes the grounding SQL over the resulting candidate table. There is NO OLS4-specific TypeScript — the URL and response shape live in the manifest, the same generic http.get resolver serves any JSON/CSV endpoint (OpenTargets, gnomAD, an arbitrary REST API), and the resolver memoizes by ETag so repeated grounding does not re-download. Network is the host's opt-in: this manifest fails closed until a host binds a fetch (the Pi extension gates that on PI_BIO_ENABLE_NETWORK=1).

resolvers.title: HTTP GET
resolvers.description: GET a declared URL and materialize the JSON/CSV response into a table.
